<!-- SPECKIT START -->
You are working in a Specification Driven Development project.

Always read:

1. constitution.md
2. glossary.md
3. architecture docs
4. user stories

Before generating code:

- Verify requirements
- Verify architecture
- Verify API contracts

Never invent business rules.

Never change requirements.

Always maintain traceability between:

Requirement
→ Story
→ Design
→ Code
→ Test
<!-- SPECKIT END -->
